query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'BRL' THEN CAST(totalQuantity AS DECIMAL(18,8)) * CAST(lastPrice AS DECIMAL(18,8)) ELSE 0 END) as total_brl_market,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'USD' THEN CAST(totalQuantity AS DECIMAL(18,8)) * CAST(lastPrice AS DECIMAL(18,8)) ELSE 0 END) as total_usd_market,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'BRL' THEN CAST(totalCost AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as total_brl_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'USD' THEN CAST(totalCost AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as total_usd_cost,
  COUNT(*) as total_ativos
FROM assets;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FZcBuoEvFxiRzn.f8fe4a2ca095 --database inNn2GrYAEeStrPTZHgZq4 --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'BRL' THEN CAST(totalQuantity AS DECIMAL(18,8)) * CAST(lastPrice AS DECIMAL(18,8)) ELSE 0 END) as total_brl_market,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'USD' THEN CAST(totalQuantity AS DECIMAL(18,8)) * CAST(lastPrice AS DECIMAL(18,8)) ELSE 0 END) as total_usd_market,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'BRL' THEN CAST(totalCost AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as total_brl_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency = 'USD' THEN CAST(totalCost AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as total_usd_cost,
  COUNT(*) as total_ativos
FROM assets;
